name: Newton's Cradle
description: Demonstrates conservation of momentum and energy using a classic pendulum-ball setup.
subject: Physics
educational_goal: Show how motion transfers through the balls in a Newton's Cradle.

scene.scene: Five identical metallic spheres hanging in a perfectly straight row from a horizontal frame, all touching each other at rest

prompt_bundle.image_prompt: Five identical metallic spheres hanging in a perfectly straight row from a horizontal frame, each on its own thin string, all touching each other at rest. Front view, neutral grey background, even studio lighting, photorealistic, symmetrical framing.
prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: The leftmost sphere swings backward and upward as a rigid pendulum, rotating around its fixed pivot point at the top. The string remains a fixed unstretching length — only the angle changes, not the length. The sphere lifts up and to the left in an arc like a clock pendulum being pulled back, then swings down and strikes the row. The leftmost sphere stops completely on contact and does not bounce back. The middle three and rightmost spheres remain completely stationary throughout. Camera fixed, front view.
prompt_bundle.direction: backward and upward to the left, then down toward the row
prompt_bundle.motion: rigid pendulum swing rotating around fixed pivot, stops dead on contact
prompt_bundle.constraints: String remains rigid and fixed length. Pivot point fixed at top. Only leftmost sphere moves. All other four spheres stay completely stationary. No string stretching. No bouncing back after impact.
prompt_bundle.stop_condition: Leftmost sphere stops completely on contact with the row and does not move again
prompt_bundle.negative_prompt: string stretching, string lengthening, rightmost moving, symmetric motion, bouncing back, all balls swinging, double swing, camera movement

scene.scene: Five metallic spheres, leftmost now touching the row having completed its swing and stopped
scene.camera: Fixed, front view, same framing as clip 1

prompt_bundle.motion_prompt: Only the rightmost sphere swings outward and upward to the right as a rigid pendulum rotating around its fixed pivot point at the top. String length unchanged. The leftmost sphere is completely stationary and touching the row. The middle three spheres do not move at all. Camera fixed, front view.
prompt_bundle.direction: outward and upward to the right
prompt_bundle.motion: rigid pendulum swing rotating around fixed pivot point to the right only
prompt_bundle.constraints: All other four spheres completely stationary. Leftmost sphere touching row and not moving. Pivot fixed at top. String length unchanged. No symmetric motion.
prompt_bundle.stop_condition: Rightmost sphere reaches peak height on the right side
prompt_bundle.negative_prompt: leftmost sphere moving, symmetric motion, both end balls moving, all balls swinging, any ball bouncing back, camera movement
